productDisplayName: Timberland Men's Cityendur Ox Grey Shoe
description: These shoes from Timbaland offer the best in terms of sleek styling and comfortable design. The use of premium materials and wearer friendly features makes this an excellent pair suited for casual wear. Team this with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Premium full-grain leather upper offers rugged durability Stitch detailing for added structure and style Lace-ups for snug Fit Embossed logo beside the heel cup Midsole Exclusive anti-fatigue technology provides all-day comfort and support Outsole Injected TPU lugs offers outstanding traction and flexible, lightweight performance shoe careUse the appropriate timberland leather shoe polish to keep your shoes cleanDo not use polish over canvas/woven areas
